message:
✨ Expand demo data coverage to 62 cards (43%) (#447)

* ✨ Add demo data to workloads, networking, and storage hooks

Added demo mode support to the following hooks:
- useJobs, useHPAs, useReplicaSets, useStatefulSets, useDaemonSets, useCronJobs
- useIngresses, useNetworkPolicies
- usePVs

All hooks now check getDemoMode() and return realistic demo data when enabled,
enabling full functionality in demo mode without a backend connection.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* ✨ Expand demo data coverage to 62 cards (43%)

- Added demo data to hooks: Jobs, HPAs, ReplicaSets, StatefulSets,
  DaemonSets, CronJobs, Ingresses, NetworkPolicies, PVs
- Updated 20 card configs to mark isDemoData: true for cards that now
  have demo data in their hooks
- Demo data coverage increased from 29% (42 cards) to 43% (62 cards)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
